data.label: 即构极速视频 SDK
data.description: 极速视频（Express Video）是一款实时的音视频互动服务产品，能够为开发者提供便捷接入、高可靠、多平台互通的音视频服务。通过低至 200 ms 的端到端平均时延，业内领先的保障弱网质量的 QoS 策略，并结合强大的 3A 处理能力，完美支持一对多、多对多的实时音视频通话、直播、会议等场景。

data.label: Zego Express Video SDK
data.description: Express Video is a real-time audio and video interactive service product that provides developers with convenient access, high reliability, and multi-platform interoperable audio and video services. With an end-to-end average delay as low as 200 ms, industry-leading QoS strategies for weak network quality assurance, and powerful 3A processing capabilities, it perfectly supports one-to-many, many-to-many real-time audio and video calls, live streaming, conferences, and other scenarios.
